concerns.text: FR-003 requires extracting time series using Yeo 7-network atlas, but the plan mandates AAL atlas (Constitution Principle VI). This is a direct contradiction. No task explicitly addresses this discrepancy.
FR-010 specifies a post-hoc power analysis, while the plan details an a priori power analysis. This is a methodological mismatch. No task explicitly reconciles this difference.
Task T019 implements a post-hoc power analysis, but the plan's a priori approach means the power analysis requirement (FR-010) is not coherently addressed across all artifacts.
SC-005 requires a power ≥80%, but the plan defers the sample size calculation to a later stage ('[deferred]'). No task ensures this success criterion is met.

concerns.location: plan.md:Dataset Scarcity Contingency vs. spec.md:Edge Cases
concerns.text: The plan's contingency allows proceeding with datasets lacking mindfulness intervention data, while the spec's edge cases only address unavailable datasets. This creates scope ambiguity. No task addresses this.
No task explicitly addresses the requirement in FR-008 to document dataset-variable fit by verifying all required variables are present.
No task explicitly addresses the requirement in FR-009 to frame all findings as associational.
